expect: Dark-matter lessons (zero outgoing citations) contain extractable cross-domain knowledge at >=50% rate. Sample 15, classify as extractable vs isolated. Predict: >=8/15 have identifiable missing connections.
actual: Independent replication (n=15 sampled, 11 genuine dark-matter after FP exclusion): 11/11 (100%) extractable. Era boundary: pre-L-500 is 41-67% DM, post-L-500 is <4%. L-1166 prediction 1 STRONGLY CONFIRMED. L-1169.
